The {{RewardIconWithLink|Club Pack|orange}} can be purchased once from the [[Club Shop]] for 5k {{RewardIconWithLink|Star Coin}}.

A super value pack for rookies. It contains resources that help you embark on your journey.

It contains:
* {{RewardIconWithText|Clone Speedup, +15h}}
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Lottery Ticket, +3|orange}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +50k}}

[[Category:Reward Pack]]
